diagrams.title: Program Interrupt Cycle Flow
diagrams.description: A flowchart showing the step-by-step process of the program interrupt cycle, from interrupt detection to returning to the main program. This helps students visualize the complete sequence of events when an interrupt occurs.
diagrams.purpose: Explains the sequential flow of the interrupt handling process and helps students understand each step in the cycle

diagrams.title: Interrupt Hardware Architecture
diagrams.description: A block diagram showing the interaction between CPU, Interrupt Controller, and I/O devices during an interrupt. This illustrates the hardware components involved in interrupt handling.
diagrams.purpose: Shows how hardware components communicate during interrupt handling and helps understand the physical interrupt mechanism

diagrams.title: Interrupt Timing Sequence
diagrams.description: A timing diagram showing the chronological sequence of signals and operations during the interrupt cycle. This helps students understand the temporal relationships between different events.
diagrams.purpose: Illustrates the timing and synchronization of interrupt signals and helps students understand when each event occurs in the cycle
